creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
www/chromium fails to build on main (aka 14-current), at least devel/wasi-* are already installed.
Strangely, didn't fail on stable/13, which has llvm/clang14 on base, too.

This would be because devel/wasi-* is only for llvm13 only.


The failure mode is as follows.

[ 25% 13395/51735] c++ -MMD -MF obj/v8/v8_base_without_compiler/wasm-import-wrapper-cache.o.d -DUSE_AURA=1 -DUSE_GLIB=1 -DUSE_OZONE=1 -DOFFICIAL_BUILD -D__STDC_CONSTANT_MACROS -D__STDC_FORMAT_MACROS
